data.title: Update project docs to reflect @playwright/cli migration
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, and other existing docs that reference Playwright MCP or .playwright-mcp/ to reflect the @playwright/cli migration.
**Why**: After migration, existing documentation describing MCP-based browser automation becomes misleading for future development.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md Playwright references; CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md E2E test command examples; workflow-config-schema.json Playwright references; any other existing docs referencing Playwright MCP
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, existing project documentation accurately describes the @playwright/cli-based browser automation patterns with no remaining references to Playwright MCP as the active interface

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting and conventions
